acquisition method: Data were acquired in the Data Dependent Acquisition (DDA) mode.
cleavage agent: Peptides were analyzed by liquid chromatography–tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS) on a Nanoacquity ultraperformance liquid chromatography system (Waters) connected to Linear Trap Quadrupole (LTQ) Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer (Thermo). Peptides were separated using analytical Easy-Spray C18 columns (75 μm × 150 mm) (Thermo, ES800).
collision energy: normalized collision energy 27 was used in a higher-energy dissociation mode (HCD).
fragmentation method: normalized collision energy 27 was used in a higher-energy dissociation mode (HCD).
instrument: Samples were analyzed using PRM mode with an isolation window of 1.4 Th. PRM scans were done using 30000 resolutions (AGC target 2e5, 200 ms maximum injection time) triggered by an inclusion list (Supplementary Table 5).
labeling: we performed metabolic Stable Isotope Labeling In Arabidopsis followed by Immuno-Precipitation and Mass Spectrometry (SILIA IP-MS) analysis of BSU1-YFP in transgenic Arabidopsis.
